channel.title: iron; ligand effects; magnetic properties; spin crossover; binuclearcomplexes on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in iron; ligand effects; magnetic properties; spin crossover; binuclearcomplexes on LMI

item.title: The Nature Of Spin Crossover And Coordination Core Distortion In Afamily Of Binuclear Iron(Ii) Complexes With Bipyridyl-Like Bridgingligands
